'''âk-j-s-m''' ('''kakajsemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teargas|teargas]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teargas|teargas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-j-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakajsemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajsemoko|thikajsemoko]] || [[word:jikajsemoko|jikajsemoko]] || [[word:shikajsemoko|shikajsemoko]] || [[word:kikajsemoko|kikajsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukajsemoko|thuthukajsemoko]] || [[word:jujukajsemoko|jujukajsemoko]] || [[word:shushukajsemoko|shushukajsemoko]] || [[word:kukukajsemoko|kukukajsemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokajsemoko|thokajsemoko]] || [[word:jokajsemoko|jokajsemoko]] || [[word:shokajsemoko|shokajsemoko]] || [[word:kokajsemoko|kokajsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkajsemoko|thĂŠkajsemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkajsemoko|jĂŠkajsemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkajsemoko|shĂŠkajsemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkajsemoko|kĂŠkajsemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakajsemoko|thakajsemoko]] || [[word:jakajsemoko|jakajsemoko]] || [[word:shakajsemoko|shakajsemoko]] || [[word:kakajsemoko|kakajsemoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
